since_last: 36% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.66%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -2.11% · Gold +1.07% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 36% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.66%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.66%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.37%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +13.49%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +13.49%, MU +13.16%, TER +10.60%, LRCX +7.52%, KLAC +7.24%. Laggards: INOD -10.50%, PUBM -6.71%, DELL -6.45%, AI -5.92%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.19% at $152.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
